# oai-style-cover

> An editorial cover generator. Nine cover styles are drawn in the browser with
> Canvas 2D and saved as PNG up to 5120 px. No image model, no upload, no account.

Open https://oai-cover.vercel.app and nine covers are already on the shelf. Click one
to open it, type a title, press space for another version, press D to save a PNG.
Frames are 1:1, 16:9 and 4:5. You can drop in your own screenshot or logo and it is
composed into the cover locally; nothing leaves the browser.

Every cover is a program rather than a generated image, so the same seed always draws
the same picture, and an export is deterministic at any size.

## The nine styles

- Cool Optical — cool gradients folded like light through glass
- Organic Bloom — petals and soft botanical forms
- Aurora Film — thin iridescent film, aurora colours
- Minimal Type — flat colour, one confident line of type, a marker gesture
- Utility Cards — small functional tiles on a calm ground
- Brand Lockup — one or two marks centred, with a thin divider
- Product UI — an app window rendered as illustration
- Semantic Object — macro material: phyllotaxis, stacked paper, heat fins, woven cloth
- Signal Poster — high-energy radial bursts, meteor rain, horizontal rush

## Details

- Free and open source, MIT: https://github.com/cyrus-cai/oai-style-cover
- Static site: no build step, no dependencies, no backend
- The design language comes from the openai-editorial-cover prompt skill, rewritten as code
- Author: Cyrus Cai, https://x.com/cyrusss_7
